title: Lead SEO Specialist at Nivea India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Nivea India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Nivea India Asia Pacific Associates! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Nivea India Asia Pacific Associates:
Nivea India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nivea India Asia Pacific Associates!
